librariesUsed.name: Anime.js
librariesUsed.purpose: Particle dust puffs, SVG path drawing, bar chart animations, scroll reveal stagger, toggle dust trail, micro-feedback checkmark

librariesUsed.name: SortableJS
librariesUsed.purpose: Kanban card drag-and-drop between canyon layer lanes

librariesUsed.name: Tippy.js
librariesUsed.purpose: Weathered plaque-styled tooltips on navigation, nodes, and badges

viewHintCompliance.dashboard: Mesa formation stat cards at different heights, terracotta accents on key metrics, dried-earth dividers
viewHintCompliance.projects: Trail map layout with waypoints along winding SVG path, elevation and distance metadata per waypoint
viewHintCompliance.project-workspace: Canyon layout with sidebar cliffs and main content valley, weathered panel borders, resizable split
viewHintCompliance.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes as canyon layers at different depths, sandstone block cards with weathered edge corners
viewHintCompliance.whiteboard: Desert canvas with sandstone nodes and dried-riverbed SVG connector paths
viewHintCompliance.schema-planner: Geological survey diagram with rock formation entity blocks and fault line relationship connectors
viewHintCompliance.directory-tree: Canyon-rim hierarchy with branching trails, terracotta folder markers, collapsible branches
viewHintCompliance.ideas: Pinterest masonry with sandstone-textured cards at varying heights like mesa formations
viewHintCompliance.ai-chat: Park ranger dispatch format with field notes, GPS location stamps, radio codes, and spec blocks
viewHintCompliance.settings: Trail guide wizard with numbered waypoint markers, trail connector lines, terrain descriptions

antiRepeatCompliance: Used warm sand outdoor landscape instead of dark charcoal carved interior (Pass 1)
Used warm sunlit mesa surface instead of dark layered strata underground (Pass 2)
Used warm sandstone with sage/terracotta instead of pure black obsidian with fire/magma (Pass 3)
Used weathered erosion and canyon depth instead of glass reflections and volcanic cracks (Pass 3)
Used park ranger field notes chat instead of forge communication chat (Pass 3)
